title: Russian Roasted Golubyi
description: A hearty, comforting dish featuring roasted golubyi with a crispy top and savory flavors.
instructions: Season the golubyi with salt, black pepper, and dried thyme.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the golubyi until browned on both sides, about 5 minutes per side.
Transfer the golubyi to a baking dish and roast in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until tender.
Remove the golubyi from the oven and top with grated cheddar cheese.
Return the golubyi to the oven and bake for an additional 5-10 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
